---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Publications, grants, and protocols across methodological biostatistics and applied collaborations — use the filter bar to browse by type and research area."
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

My research portfolio has two strands that continuously inform each other:

- **Methodological biostatistics** — Bayesian design and inference, robust
  empirical-Bayes methods, noninferiority testing, replicability in
  genome-wide studies, and information-theoretic methods for applied
  problems.
- **Applied collaboration** — long-term partnerships across pediatric
  oncology, spinal cord injury, neuroscience, and public health, where
  I serve as the primary biostatistician on trial designs, observational
  studies, and secondary analyses.

For the pediatric-oncology clinical-trial portfolio, see the
[Beat Childhood Cancer](bcc.qmd) page.

[**Download full CV (PDF)**](Berg-CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4097-7348){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Penn State Pure](https://pennstate.pure.elsevier.com/en/persons/arthur-berg){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=asQf9VQAAAAJ){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

{{< include _research-body.qmd >}}
